name: cursor-cli-task-watchdog
title: cursor-cli-task-watchdog
description: Long-running Cursor CLI task watcher backed by ./tasks/list.jsonl, with cron/event polling, dependency workflow dispatch, ad hoc Cursor CLI execution, post-task skill mining, skill review, and commit.
